# ADR-0001: Sign mode textual — Annex 1

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-06

## Context

The annex half of the pair — same directory, same number 0001, same base
slug (`sign-mode-textual`) as the main document, with a recognizable
`-annex1` suffix.

## Decision

Use this as the other half of the seeded ADR-0009 violation.

## Consequences

None beyond the seeded D1 finding, downgraded per ADR-0009.
